title: Cone
description: Cone: A solid circular right angled cone

Radius.description: Distance from the Centre to the edge of the circular base Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Height.description: Distance from the centre of the base to the Cone's apex Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
